name: SCC_CurrentDemandRes
title: SCC_CurrentDemandRes
syntax: void SCC_CurrentDemandRes ( byte SessionId[], long ResponseCode, float EVSEPresentVoltage, float EVSEPresentCurrent, byte LimitAchievedFlags[], char EVSEID[], long SAScheduleTupleID, long ReceiptRequired)
description: The callback is called as soon as a Current Demand Response is received. Further details that are transmitted in this message can be queried with the following functions:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: EVSEPresentVoltage
parameters.description: Present voltage value of charge point.

parameters.name: LimitAchievedFlags (ISO 15118)
parameters.description: Array of three flags which correspond to current | voltage | power limit achieved, in this order.

parameters.name: ReceiptRequired (ISO 15118)
parameters.description: Indicates if the vehicle is required to send a MeteringReceiptReq.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
